name: tanban
description: A keyboard-driven kanban board for your terminal, built with OpenTUI + Bun.
author: Preslav Mihaylov <preslav@pmihaylov.com>

scripts.install:bin: bun run build && mkdir -p "$HOME/.local/bin" && install -m 0755 dist/tanban "$HOME/.local/bin/tanban" && echo "installed tanban -> $HOME/.local/bin/tanban"
